generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our nation at risk. The recent cuts have left our troops with outdated equipment and weakened our deterrence. We can't afford to be unprepared while threats grow worldwide. It's time to invest in our defense - our safety depends on it. #SupportOurTroops #NationalSecurityFirst
